docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DWAYNE

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAESAR, MICHAEL SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-15-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-21-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JUL-21-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 03
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

#3 GUY T. GURNEY--REPTR DEBORAH NEVILLE--CC FOR CT TRIAL. ALL PRESENT. STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AGAINST DEF FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES PLUS $300.00. PLTF WILL FORGIVE ONE MONTH'S RENT IN CONSIDERATION OF DEF'S VACATING PREMISES ON AUG 1, L993. IF ALL TERMS MET, NO EXECUTION TO PROCEED. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DWAYNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: FIRST FLOOR BEDROOM IN 24 ALDER ST, SF, CA $300.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00, STAYED UNTIL AUG-01-1993, LEASE FORFEITED
